description: Ground truth contradiction pairs for synthetic_policy.txt. 8 true contradictions across 17 clauses.

contradictions.note: Clause A permits AI for any assignment; Clause B prohibits all AI assistance in submitted work.
Clause A permits AI code generation in all CS/engineering courses; Clause B prohibits AI-generated code in all programming courses.
Clause A encourages AI writing assistance for non-native speakers; Clause B prohibits AI writing tools for non-native speakers.
Clause A permits AI collaboration on take-home exams; Clause B explicitly prohibits AI on all examinations including take-home.
Clause A approves AI for all coursework with disclosure; Clause B forbids AI unless explicitly authorized per-assignment in syllabus.
Clause A requires disclosure for every AI tool use; Clause B carves out an exception (no disclosure for grammar/spell checking).
Clause A gives Board sole authority over sanctions; Clause B empowers instructors to independently impose sanctions without Board referral.
Clause A broadly permits AI for brainstorming/drafting; Clause B forbids automated tools unless instructor-authorized in syllabus.
